meaning: n.极端主义者,过激分子adj.极端主义(者)
examples: Colleagues had expected a discussion on a medical issue but were instead given an extremist interpretation of the Koran, which Hasan appeared to believe.
Often, opposition comes not only from the conservatives, who cling to tradition, but also from the extremist militants, who favor neither the old nor the new.
Plato, of course, is an extremist.
The second explanation for General Musharraf's half-measures is that he is afraid of the extremist groups.
He said extremist groups use the Web more as a marketing and communication tool.
